description_long: This object is an open book with a hard, dark-colored cover and blank white pages. The book is lying flat, with its pages slightly curved at the center, suggesting it is made from standard paper. The edges of the pages are clean and even, and the book appears to be of medium thickness, typical of a hardcover novel or textbook. The cover is plain, with no visible illustration, text, or decorative elements. The spine is not visible in any of the views, and there are no distinguishing marks or logos. The overall appearance is minimalistic and utilitarian, suitable for a variety of urban settings such as libraries, parks, or cafes.
description: A plain, open hardcover book with blank white pages and a dark cover, showing no visible illustration or text.
description_view_0: The open book is viewed from the front, displaying the blank white pages and the central crease.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the side, showing the thickness of the pages and the dark edge of the cover.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this view shows the open pages from the opposite side, with the central crease visible.
description_view_3: The book is viewed from the opposite side as view 1, again highlighting the thickness and the dark cover edge.
